Document:
# Medical V2
## Overview - The medical system has heavily changed. - Patients now suffer specific wounds on their limbs. - Wounds reduce the maximum health of the affected limb until they are cleaned up. - Healing wounds with the optimal treatment restores the limb's maximum health.
## Inspecting injuries - For a detailed report, right click a patient and choose [bold]Inspect injuries[/bold]. - You can also use [keybind="CMUInspectInjuries"] while targeting the patient. - The report lists their wounds and the optimal treatment needed for each one.
## Field treatment crafting - Use [keybind="CMUOpenMedicalCraftingMenu"] to fast craft medical treatments. - Crafting uses one ingredient and one base item. - The two packed base items are packed gauze and packed trauma kits. - Normal medical gauze and trauma kits can also be used as base items.
## Ingredients
\n
## Base items
\n
## Optimal treatments - Bullet, stab, fragment, ballistic, and sharp wounds need a hemostatic dressing made with coagulant powder. - Contaminated wounds and dirty dressings need an antiseptic dressing made with antiseptic. - Burns and charred tissue need a burn gel dressing made with burn gel. - Slashes, surgical wounds, and poor closure need a sealing dressing made with tissue sealant. - Crush, blast, and crush-debris wounds need a compression dressing made with trauma foam. - Retained fragments must have the shrapnel removed before the correct dressing can finish the cleanup.
## Adequate treatment - If a marine is [bold]adequately treated[/bold], another bandage already stopped or covered the wound. - Adequate treatment is not optimal treatment. - Apply the correct treatment from the injury report to clean the wound up and restore the lost maximum limb health.
## Surgical line and synth graft - Surgical line now heals limb health only. - Synth graft now heals limb health only. - Neither item cleans up wounds or restores maximum limb health by itself. - Use the correct crafted treatment for wounds, then use line or graft when the limb still needs health.
